title: 현재완료 (경험)
example: I have been to London twice.
exampleKo: 나는 런던에 두 번 가 본 적이 있다.

title: 현재완료 (계속)
example: She has lived here for ten years.

title: 현재완료 (완료·결과)
example: He has just finished his homework.

title: 수동태
example: The letter was written by Tom.

title: 관계대명사 who
example: The man who called you is my uncle.

title: 관계대명사 which
example: This is the book which I recommended.

title: 관계부사 where/when
rule: where: 장소, when: 시간. 뒤에 완전한 절
example: I remember the day when we first met.

title: 가정법 과거
rule: If + 과거, 주절 would/could + 동사원형. 현재 사실 반대
example: If I had time, I would help you.

title: 가정법 과거완료
rule: If + had p.p., would have p.p. 과거 사실 반대
example: If she had studied, she would have passed.

title: 분사구문
example: Walking down the street, I met an old friend.

title: too ~ to
rule: too + 형용사/부사 + to V: 너무 ~해서 …할 수 없다
example: The box is too heavy to carry.
exampleKo: 그 상자는 너무 무거워서 들 수 없다.

title: enough to
rule: 형용사/부사 + enough + to V: …할 만큼 충분히
example: She is old enough to vote.

title: 간접의문문
example: I don't know where he lives.

title: It is ~ that 강조
example: It was Tom that broke the window.

title: 도치
example: Never have I seen such a view.
